Title: Relates to residential foreclosure actions
Summary: Clarifies provisions governing when foreclosure actions are deemed abandoned for failure of a plaintiff to timely seek a default judgment; governs when foreclosure actions are deemed terminated for purposes of the savings clause permitting actions to be recommenced following termination of a prior action and be deemed timely; governs the finality of dismissed or discontinued residential foreclosure actions.
LawCode: Amd R3408, §205-a, CPLR; add §1394, RPAP L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the civil practice law and rules and the real property actions and proceedings law, in relation to residential foreclosure actions
